Dear Valued Business Partner.

Thank you for your e-mail and we acknowledge receipt of your request and will be allocated to an administrator or Assessor to assist.

Please take note that this mailbox is utilized for ;  Escalations  Queries  Approved reports  Authorisations.

Kind regards

OLD MUTUAL INSURE
MOTOR CLAIMS DIGITAL ASSESSING
Old Mutual Insure, Wanooka Place, St Andrews Road, Parktown
